title: trigonotis radicans var. sericea
intro: Trigonotis radicans var. sericea, also known as the silky trigonotis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting wound healing. Trigonotis radicans var. sericea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
